positive: A whimsical and stylized illustration of a friendly, anthropomorphic fox sitting in a lush meadow at dawn. The fox should have clean, crisp silhouettes, wearing a small, patterned scarf. Surrounding elements include stylized flowers, oversized leaves, and gentle, diffused light casting long shadows. The composition is centered, creating a repeating, easily tileable pattern effect suitable for apparel. The color palette uses earthy tones (sienna, sage green, pale blue) accented by pops of vibrant color. Flat design mixed with detailed watercolor textures. Highly detailed, vector illustration, symmetrical composition, perfect for screen printing, high contrast, clean lines, forestcore aesthetic.
negative: blurry, grainy, text, watermark, signature, artifacts, poor quality, bad anatomy, extra limbs, mutated, low detail, messy, photographic, photorealistic, noise, bokeh
